summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhaiya AI Phase 2 features - all backend APIs working perfectly, frontend pages implemented correctly
passed_tests: Authentication endpoint (GET /api/auth/me) working with test session
Focus Mode: POST /api/focus/start creates focus session successfully
Focus Mode: POST /api/focus/end completes focus session successfully
Focus Mode: GET /api/focus/sessions returns focus session history
Challenge Mode: GET /api/challenges/today returns 3 daily challenges
Challenge Mode: POST /api/challenges/complete marks challenge as done
Challenge Mode: GET /api/challenges/streak returns streak and XP data
Routines: POST /api/routines creates new routine successfully
Routines: GET /api/routines returns routines list
Routines: PUT /api/routines/{id} updates routine successfully
Routines: DELETE /api/routines/{id} deletes routine successfully
Routines: POST /api/routines/{id}/log logs routine completion
Routines: GET /api/routines/{id}/logs returns routine logs
Weekly Summary: GET /api/summary/weekly returns AI-generated summary (835 chars)
Progress Card: GET /api/progress-card returns progress card data
Enhanced Stats: GET /api/stats includes focus sessions and challenges data
Chat: POST /api/chat works with 'future_you' mode (1198 chars response)
Chat: POST /api/chat works with 'brutal_honesty' mode (1277 chars response)
Landing page loads correctly with hero text 'Stop guessing. Start improving.'
Dashboard implemented with 8 action cards (Study, Health, Talk, Call, Focus Mode, Challenges, Routines, Brutal Honesty)
Dashboard shows quick links (Weekly Summary, Progress Card, Future You)
Focus Mode page implemented with timer presets (15, 25, 50, 90 minutes)
Challenges page implemented with daily challenges and streak counter
Routines page implemented with create form and CRUD operations
Weekly Summary page implemented with stats and AI summary display
Progress Card page implemented with shareable card component
Chat page shows mode selector with all 7 modes (educator, coach, wellness, listener, general, future_you, brutal_honesty)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all pages implemented, minor browser automation issues during testing)
